issues.description: Two sources (fivetran.com press release and thenewstack.io article) were not present in config/source_allowlist.txt at the time of submission. Both sources were manually verified by the Chief Editor and are high-quality, reputable outlets directly relevant to the story.
issues.correction: The domains have been noted for allowlist review. No factual changes to the article content are required. Readers are informed via this corrections record that the sources were explicitly approved during editorial review.
